heading: Purposes
label: 6501 Purposes
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–624, title XXI, § 2101104 Stat. 3935Nov. 28, 1990“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Organic Foods Production Act of 1990’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–624, title XXI, § 2101104 Stat. 3935Nov. 28, 1990“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Organic Foods Production Act of 1990’.”

children.text: to establish national standards governing the marketing of certain agricultural products as organically produced products;
to assure consumers that organically produced products meet a consistent standard; and
to facilitate interstate commerce in fresh and processed food that is organically produced.
